description: A customer wants to swap an item in their upcoming monthly subscription box for a different one.

nodes.task_description: Log into their account and go to the 'Manage Subscription' page.

expected_outcome.value: The customer accesses their subscription details.

nodes.task_description: Select the option to 'Edit' the next box.

expected_outcome.value: The customer enters the editing mode for their upcoming order.

nodes.task_description: Remove one item and add a different item, then save the changes.

expected_outcome.value: The contents of the next subscription order are successfully updated.
